variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 127 Breather Filter | Replaces the Parker SAB1563.40
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 127 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the Parker SAB1563.40. Easy to install and replace, the FS 127 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
